expectations.text: ponder.config.ts reads deployedContracts from SE-2 nextjs package
expectations.evidence: Hardcodes ABI from local abis/YourContract.ts file. Hardcodes contract address as '0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3'. No bridge to SE-2's deployedContracts.ts

expectations.text: ponder.config.ts reads scaffoldConfig for network detection
expectations.evidence: Hardcodes chainId: 31337 and 'localhost' network name. No import from scaffoldConfig

expectations.text: Package named @se-2/ponder following SE-2 workspace convention
Uses Ponder virtual module imports (ponder:registry, ponder:schema, ponder:api)
expectations.evidence: Uses OLD import style: 'import { ponder } from "@/generated"' and 'import { greetingChange } from "../ponder.schema"'. Virtual modules not used

expectations.text: Schema uses onchainTable (not older createSchema API)
expectations.evidence: Uses onchainTable from @ponder/core — correct API (though from old package name)

expectations.text: Hono-based API setup for GraphQL (not old express-style)
expectations.evidence: Uses OLD express-style: ponder.use('/graphql', graphql()) — not Hono. No Hono import, no app creation

expectations.text: Root package.json has ponder proxy scripts
expectations.evidence: Root has ponder:dev, ponder:start, ponder:codegen proxy scripts
No ponder-env.d.ts file created. Virtual module types won't resolve
